name: data-science-final-exam
description: Basics of Data Science final exam — static frontend + Vercel grading API

scripts.postinstall: node -e "const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync('api/data/answer-key.json')){console.warn('\n⚠  Missing api/data/answer-key.json — run: py scripts/split_questions.py\n');}"
